Flagship Project

PrepWise

The product I'm building from scratch. An AI interview intelligence platform — because the best way to understand PM is to do it.

Live · Actively building
PrepWise

A live AI interview platform covering PM and Consulting tracks — with company-specific personas, rubrics, and case libraries modelled on how Zepto, CRED, Razorpay, McKinsey, and 20+ other companies actually evaluate candidates.

V1 · Live Now
Core Engine
JD + Resume input · Company personas · Real-time sessions · Adaptive feedback
V2 · Next
Guided Setup
Redesigned onboarding · Session intent · Architect introduction · Goal setting
V3 · Planned
Intelligence Layer
Resume DNA · Readiness Score · Gap analysis · Smart defaults for return users
V4 · North Star
Full Platform
AI picks sessions · Global scale · Zero hardcoded templates · Fully personalised

"Here's everything I've made and learned so far."

I'm Shreyas — a fresher aspiring PM from Delhi, currently in my final year at Shaheed Bhagat Singh College, University of Delhi.

I've spent the last 2 years inside real products — Founder's Office and community builder at Outscal (ed-tech), and growth at Wishlink (creator economy). I've sat inside the decisions and the feedback loops. I've seen what moves products and what doesn't.

Now I'm building PrepWise — an AI interview platform I started because I wanted to understand what it feels like to own a product end to end. Not just write about it. Build it, break it, fix it.

I believe the best PMs are obsessive learners. I break products down to understand them. I document everything because writing forces clarity. I'm building tools because shipping is the fastest way to learn.

Reach out — always open to a conversation.
